creator: chuanwei.foo@hotmail.com
text:
Additional issues:

* I noticed that "%%DBUS_DAEMON%%" and "%%AVAHI_DAEMON%%" are not expanded. By default, ipp-usb expects a running Avahi daemon, but ipp-usb will still work without Avahi if one's printer setup does not require DNS-SD. Should the ipp-usb port depend on the avahi port?

* Should I patch the ipp-usb.8 man page? e.g. replace "/etc/ipp-usb" with "/usr/local/etc/ipp-usb".
